title: Move primary run ledger closer to top
summary: Run-ledger proof is useful but buried below composed modules.
nextAction: Prototype a run-ledger-first layout in a disposable generated repo.

title: Add collapsible module sections
summary: Composed demo pages become too long when multiple section recipes are enabled.
acceptance: secondary modules can collapse without hiding core content
nextAction: Design a static details/summary pattern with visual QA coverage.

title: Nocturne Signal launch request
summary: A dark techno-oracle GitHub Pages site for presenting projects, agent workflows, artifacts, and operating principles with verified static-site boundaries.
acceptance: request cards filter by status and priority
nextAction: Use the inbox as input for briefing generation.

title: Track failed experiments explicitly
summary: Future agents need a clean place to record dead ends and why they were rejected.
acceptance: reason and rollback note are required
nextAction: Extend schemas after inbox proof is stable.

title: Generate a site-specific chief-of-staff briefing
summary: Generate a compact static chief-of-staff briefing from atlas, runs, requests, roadmap, and search index data.
acceptance: briefing is generated from public data
nextAction: Use briefing as candidate primary surface for layout recipe.

title: Keep the primary module above supporting surfaces
summary: Dense composed pages bury the functional module visitors came to use; add a primary-first layout with collapsible supporting modules.
acceptance: primary surface appears before secondary modules
secondary modules use accessible details/summary wrappers
nextAction: Publish proof and back-port generator support.
